result.summary: VEED exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://www.veed.io/api/v1/mcp for Fabric video-generation workflows; its public API marketing pages otherwise point developers to VEED-branded models hosted on fal.ai rather than a separate VEED-hosted REST/GraphQL API or CLI.
result.description: VEED is a web-based video creation and editing platform with AI features such as avatars, lip sync, subtitles, and background removal. It also offers a Fabric MCP integration that lets AI assistants generate videos through VEED.

veed_oauth_client.label: VEED OAuth app/client for MCP access
veed_oauth_client.setup: Register an OAuth client with VEED using the dynamic client registration endpoint at [VEED OAuth registration](https://www.veed.io/api/v1/oauth2/reg). Then connect an MCP client to `https://www.veed.io/api/v1/mcp`; VEED's docs say the assistant redirects you to VEED login and authorization on first use. Authorize with the scopes advertised by VEED, including `mcp:read`, `offline_access`, and `openid`.
